nodes.name: AI Provider Placeholder
nodes.notes: Replace this Code node with an OpenAI/Claude/Gemini n8n node using n8n Credentials (credential-placeholder only — never commit an API key). REPORT DRAFT NOTES ONLY — do NOT add any node that pulls live analytics or platform metrics (no Meta/TikTok/Zalo/Google Ads/GA4/CRM), and never claim real metrics unless they are provided in the Core request. No image/video generation node. No Canva/ComfyUI/Fal.ai connector. No publishing/posting/ad-launch/spend node. Keep the Validate Contract + Safety and Return Validation Failure nodes as the safety gate. Do not commit API keys.
